title: fagara goldmanii
intro: Fagara goldmanii, also known as the Goldman's Zanthoxylum, is a species of plant that belongs to the genus Zanthoxylum and is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Fagara goldmanii include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating various skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis. Fagara goldmanii can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
